> Looks correct!
> 
> Optional, but we could probably factorize all the `removeEmptyRefinementsFromUiState` functions into one with a variable `key` (and maybe some more logic to pass for the reduce) and see if this has an impact on the increased bundle size.

Tried it initially but I got so many frustrations with types I went back to this state. Ideally the refactored function would accept the connector indexUiState as a generic type which extends a base type, and a predicate argument that returns whether the value is empty or not. But the type intersections for [IndexUiState](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch/blob/master/packages/instantsearch.js/src/types/ui-state.ts#L20-L40) are difficult to work with.
